## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential content marketing partnership between fwd.digital and getgc.ai](https://fathom.video/share/7yLet2XF2wpEJJ1_3eZ3H8yz6tuY7TxR?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [getgc.ai is a rapidly growing startup in the legal tech space, primarily driven by founder-led education and sales](https://fathom.video/share/7yLet2XF2wpEJJ1_3eZ3H8yz6tuY7TxR?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [fwd.digital offers AI-powered content creation and SEO services, with a proven track record of rapid traffic growth for clients](https://fathom.video/share/7yLet2XF2wpEJJ1_3eZ3H8yz6tuY7TxR?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Collaboration could help getgc.ai expand beyond current educational classes and tap into broader legal content market](https://fathom.video/share/7yLet2XF2wpEJJ1_3eZ3H8yz6tuY7TxR?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Timeline considerations: fwd.digital is booking new clients for February start dates](https://fathom.video/share/7yLet2XF2wpEJJ1_3eZ3H8yz6tuY7TxR?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Topics

### getgc.ai's Current Marketing Approach

  - [Founder Chishilla leads educational classes for legal professionals](https://fathom.video/share/7yLet2XF2wpEJJ1_3eZ3H8yz6tuY7TxR?tab=summary&timestamp=125.0)
  - [Company has been selling product for \~8 months](https://fathom.video/share/7yLet2XF2wpEJJ1_3eZ3H8yz6tuY7TxR?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
  - [Strong word-of-mouth growth from founder's network](https://fathom.video/share/7yLet2XF2wpEJJ1_3eZ3H8yz6tuY7TxR?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
  - [Limited marketing channels beyond founder's efforts](https://fathom.video/share/7yLet2XF2wpEJJ1_3eZ3H8yz6tuY7TxR?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)

### fwd.digital's Content Creation Process

  - [Utilizes AI workflows for research, content generation, and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/7yLet2XF2wpEJJ1_3eZ3H8yz6tuY7TxR?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Human editors involved throughout for quality control](https://fathom.video/share/7yLet2XF2wpEJJ1_3eZ3H8yz6tuY7TxR?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Produces 10+ articles per week at 10-20 cents per word](https://fathom.video/share/7yLet2XF2wpEJJ1_3eZ3H8yz6tuY7TxR?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Includes custom knowledge bases and API integrations](https://fathom.video/share/7yLet2XF2wpEJJ1_3eZ3H8yz6tuY7TxR?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)

### SEO Strategy and Link Building

  - [Focus on building domain authority through high-quality content](https://fathom.video/share/7yLet2XF2wpEJJ1_3eZ3H8yz6tuY7TxR?tab=summary&timestamp=1056.0)
  - [Recommend link building services for newer domains ($6,000 add-on)](https://fathom.video/share/7yLet2XF2wpEJJ1_3eZ3H8yz6tuY7TxR?tab=summary&timestamp=1268.0)
  - [Aim for 20 high domain authority backlinks per month](https://fathom.video/share/7yLet2XF2wpEJJ1_3eZ3H8yz6tuY7TxR?tab=summary&timestamp=1290.0)
  - [Transparent outreach process for partnerships and backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/7yLet2XF2wpEJJ1_3eZ3H8yz6tuY7TxR?tab=summary&timestamp=1318.0)

### Potential Content Strategy for getgc.ai

  - [Expand beyond AI-specific legal topics to broader legal content](https://fathom.video/share/7yLet2XF2wpEJJ1_3eZ3H8yz6tuY7TxR?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)
  - [Target long-tail keywords relevant to in-house lawyers and general legal audience](https://fathom.video/share/7yLet2XF2wpEJJ1_3eZ3H8yz6tuY7TxR?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)
  - [Create content hubs around specific legal areas (e.g., contract law, SaaS legal issues)](https://fathom.video/share/7yLet2XF2wpEJJ1_3eZ3H8yz6tuY7TxR?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Incorporate product tie-ins and prompts to showcase getgc.ai's capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/7yLet2XF2wpEJJ1_3eZ3H8yz6tuY7TxR?tab=summary&timestamp=1673.0)

### Timeline and Results Expectations

  - [First 3 months: Focus on establishing content base and initial signals](https://fathom.video/share/7yLet2XF2wpEJJ1_3eZ3H8yz6tuY7TxR?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
  - [Inflection point typically seen around 6-12 months](https://fathom.video/share/7yLet2XF2wpEJJ1_3eZ3H8yz6tuY7TxR?tab=summary&timestamp=1388.0)
  - [Example shared of recent client (Knapsack) showing early traction after 2-3 months](https://fathom.video/share/7yLet2XF2wpEJJ1_3eZ3H8yz6tuY7TxR?tab=summary&timestamp=1430.0)

## Next Steps

  - [fwd.digital to send sample Statement of Work (SOW) to getgc.ai](https://fathom.video/share/7yLet2XF2wpEJJ1_3eZ3H8yz6tuY7TxR?tab=summary&timestamp=1697.0)
  - [Alessandra to review proposal and make decision within the next week](https://fathom.video/share/7yLet2XF2wpEJJ1_3eZ3H8yz6tuY7TxR?tab=summary&timestamp=1717.0)
  - [If moving forward, potential February start date for engagement](https://fathom.video/share/7yLet2XF2wpEJJ1_3eZ3H8yz6tuY7TxR?tab=summary&timestamp=1708.0)
